The '''''Imperial II''-class frigate''', also known as the '''Class II frigate''', was a model of [[Warship/Legends|warship]] employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]].<ref name="SWE:D" />

==Characteristics==
The ''Imperial II''-class frigate was a smaller, less powerful type of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].<ref name="RECG" />
These vessels had two extensive hangars on both sides of the hull,<ref name="SWE:D" /> which accommodated a number of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and support ships and could be used to carry suspicious vessels while they underwent scrutiny.<ref name="RECG" />

==History==
[[File:Class_II_variant.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A Class II Frigate variant.]]

The ships could perform several tasks, such as patrolling shipping lanes or engaging [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] or [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] forces. Officers fresh out of the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] were often assigned as junior-staff on board these frigates.<ref name="SWE:D" /> They were sometimes referred to as "[[Battlecruiser/Legends|battle cruisers]]" out in the field.<ref name="RECG" />

A known vessel was the [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']], used as a first mission-assignment for [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] at some point before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. It was hijacked by some of its crew, after they found the Empire's methods and corrupt military culture unbearable and defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cause.<ref name="SWE:D" />
The ''Imperial II''-class frigate seems to have at least one variant, as a ship similar to the ''Rand Ecliptic'' chased [[General/Legends|Generals]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] and [[Roons Sewell]] during the former's defection, and was subsequently destroyed. This variant had two extra secondary engines perched on each side of the command tower's neck.<ref name="SWE:TSHLORS">[[Empire 11|''Empire'' 11]]</ref>
